description_long: This is a large, round outdoor sunshade with a wide, taupe-colored fabric canopy supported by a central black pole. The canopy is slightly domed and features subtle, evenly spaced notches along its edge, giving it a segmented appearance. The supporting pole is straight and sturdy, anchored into a heavy, faceted black base designed to keep the sunshade stable in outdoor environments. The canopy appears to be made from weather-resistant fabric, suitable for providing shade in parks, patios, or urban seating areas. The overall design is functional and minimalist, with no visible branding or decorative elements. The sunshade is intended for freestanding use and can be relocated as needed.
description: A large, round taupe sunshade with a domed fabric canopy and a central black pole anchored in a heavy base. The design is minimalist and functional, ideal for outdoor urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full round canopy with visible notches and the central pole with its faceted base.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view, still highlighting the round canopy and central support, with the notches along the edge visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, showing the canopy's symmetry and the central pole.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to the others, emphasizing the uniformity of the canopy and the sturdy base.
attribute_canopy_design: round, single-panel, domed canopy with evenly spaced notches
attribute_support_structure_style: single straight central pole with a faceted, weighted base; minimalist design
